parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $("Webhook").item.json.body.prospect.telefone, text: $("Loop Over Items").item.json.message || $("prompt").item.json.mensagemPadrao, delay: 1000 }) }}

assignments.name: prompt
mensagemPadrao
assignments.value: ={{ $json.body.business_profile.mensagem_padrao || 'Olá, tudo bem? Vi sua empresa no Google Maps e ficaria feliz em te apresentar nossos serviços. O que acha de batermos um papo rápido?' }}

assignments.name: system

parameters.content:
## Prompt Dinâmico
**Alimentado pelo perfil do negócio do cliente**

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO prospector_leads (tenant_id, empresa, telefone, rating, reviews, especialidades, site, has_whatsapp)
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.body.tenant_id }}',
    '{{ $json.body.prospect.nome_empresa }}',
    '{{ $json.body.prospect.telefone }}',
    {{ $json.body.prospect.rating_google || 0 }},
    {{ $json.body.prospect.reviews_google || 0 }},
    '{{ $json.body.prospect.especialidades }}',
    '{{ $json.body.prospect.site_empresa }}',
    '{{ $json.body.prospect.has_whatsapp }}'
)
UPDATE prospector_leads SET disparo = 'sim' WHERE telefone = '{{ .item.json.body.prospect.telefone }}' AND tenant_id = '{{ .item.json.body.tenant_id }}'

INSERT INTO prospector_tenants (nome_empresa, email, senha_hash, telefone) VALUES ('{{ $json.nome_empresa }}', '{{ $json.email }}', crypt('{{ $json.password }}', gen_salt('bf')), '{{ $json.telefone }}') RETURNING id, nome_empresa, email

UPDATE prospector_tenants SET
            produtos_servicos = '{{ $json.body.profile.produtos_servicos }}',
            icp = '{{ $json.body.profile.icp }}',
            diferenciais = '{{ $json.body.profile.diferenciais }}',
            tom_abordagem = '{{ $json.body.profile.tom_abordagem }}',
            proposta_valor = '{{ $json.body.profile.proposta_valor }}',
            mensagem_padrao = '{{ $json.body.profile.mensagem_padrao }}',
            openai_api_key = '{{ $json.body.openai_api_key }}',
            serpapi_key = '{{ $json.body.serpapi_key }}'
        WHERE id = '{{ $json.body.tenant_id }}'

INSERT INTO prospector_instances (tenant_id, label, uazapi_url, instance_token, instance_name, status, uazapi_session_id, last_qr_at) VALUES ('{{ $('Route Action').first().json.body.tenant_id }}', '{{ $json.instance.label }}', '{{ $json.instance.url }}', '{{ $json.instance.token }}', '{{ $json.instance.name }}', '{{ $json.instance.status }}', '{{ $json.instance.name }}', NOW()) RETURNING id

UPDATE prospector_instances SET status = '{{ $json.status }}', last_qr_at = NOW(), disconnected_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.status }}' = 'disconnected' THEN NOW() ELSE disconnected_at END WHERE instance_token = '{{ $('Route Action').first().json.body.token }}' RETURNING id

parameters.jsCode:
const connect = $('Inst: Connect').first().json;
return [{ json: connect }];

parameters.query: UPDATE prospector_instances SET status = '{{ $json.status }}', disconnected_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.status }}' = 'disconnected' THEN NOW() ELSE disconnected_at END WHERE instance_token = '{{ $('Route Action').first().json.body.token }}' RETURNING id

parameters.jsCode:
const status = $('Inst: Status').first().json;
return [{ json: status }];

parameters.query: SELECT id, label, uazapi_url, instance_token, instance_name, status, uazapi_session_id, last_qr_at, disconnected_at, created_at FROM prospector_instances WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $json.body.tenant_id }}' ORDER BY created_at DESC

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(function(i){ return i.json; });
return [{ json: { success: true, instances: rows } }];

parameters.query: DELETE FROM prospector_instances WHERE id = '{{ $json.body.instance_id }}' AND tenant_id = '{{ $json.body.tenant_id }}' RETURNING id

SELECT id, nome_empresa, email, produtos_servicos, icp, diferenciais, tom_abordagem, proposta_valor, mensagem_padrao, openai_api_key, serpapi_key, (senha_hash = crypt('{{ $json.password }}', senha_hash)) AS password_ok FROM prospector_tenants WHERE email = '{{ $json.email }}' AND is_active = true LIMIT 1
